if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
sc.major_cd LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
sc.major_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
sc.minor_cd LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
sc.minor_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_common_m ( major_cd, major_type, major_nm, remark, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{majorCd}, #{majorType}, #{name}, #{remark}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_common_m SET major_nm = #{name}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE major_cd = #{majorCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_common_d ( comp_id, major_cd, minor_cd, minor_nm, remark, extra_1, extra_2, extra_3, extra_4, extra_5, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{majorCd}, #{minorCd}, #{name}, #{remark}, #{extra1}, #{extra2}, #{extra3}, #{extra4}, #{extra5}, 'Y', #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_common_d SET minor_nm = #{name}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, extra_1 = #{extra1}, extra_2 = #{extra2}, extra_3 = #{extra3}, extra_4 = #{extra4}, extra_5 = #{extra5}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId} AND major_cd = #{majorCd} AND minor_cd = #{minorCd} AND comp_id = '999999999999'
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_common_m sc WHERE 1=1

SELECT major_cd, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, major_div, major_nm, major_type, remark, use_yn FROM esg.tb_common_m sc WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY sc.major_cd desc LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT tdcd.major_cd, tdcm.major_nm, tdcd.minor_cd, tdcd.created_at, tdcd.created_by, tdcd.updated_at, tdcd.updated_by, tdcd.minor_nm, tdcd.minor_desc, tdcd.ord_seq, tdcd.extra_1, tdcd.extra_2, tdcd.extra_3, tdcd.extra_4, tdcd.extra_5, tdcd.remark, tdcd.use_yn, -- 파일 정보 sf.file_id, sf.file_nm AS file_name, sf.file_size, sf.extension FROM esg.tb_common_d tdcd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_m tdcm ON tdcd.major_cd = tdcm.major_cd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = tdcd.minor_cd AND sf.target_type = tdcd.major_cd WHERE tdcd.major_cd = #{majorCd} AND tdcd.comp_id = '999999999999' ORDER BY tdcd.ord_seq

SELECT tdcd.major_cd, tdcm.major_nm, tdcd.minor_cd, tdcd.created_at, tdcd.created_by, tdcd.updated_at, tdcd.updated_by, tdcd.minor_nm, tdcd.minor_desc, tdcd.ord_seq, tdcd.extra_1, tdcd.extra_2, tdcd.extra_3, tdcd.extra_4, tdcd.extra_5, tdcd.remark, tdcd.use_yn FROM esg.tb_common_d tdcd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_m tdcm ON tdcd.major_cd = tdcm.major_cd WHERE tdcd.major_cd = #{majorCd} AND tdcd.minor_cd like 'sign%' AND tdcd.comp_id = '999999999999' ORDER BY ord_seq

SELECT sc.major_cd, sc.minor_cd, sc.created_at, sc.created_by, sc.updated_at, sc.updated_by, sc.minor_nm, sc.minor_desc, sc.ord_seq, sc.extra_1, sc.extra_2, sc.extra_3, sc.extra_4, sc.extra_5, sc.remark, sc.use_yn, -- 파일 정보 sf.file_id, sf.file_nm AS file_name, sf.file_size, sf.extension FROM esg.tb_common_d sc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = sc.minor_cd AND sf.target_type = sc.major_cd WHERE sc.major_cd = #{searchCd} AND sc.comp_id = '999999999999'
ORDER BY ord_seq LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT major_cd, minor_cd, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, minor_nm, minor_desc, ord_seq, extra_1, extra_2, extra_3, extra_4, extra_5, remark, use_yn FROM esg.tb_common_d sc WHERE sc.major_cd = #{searchCd} AND sc.comp_id = '999999999999'
ORDER BY ord_seq LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_common_d sc WHERE 1=1 AND sc.major_cd = #{searchCd} AND sc.comp_id = '999999999999'

SELECT a.comp_id, a.major_cd, m.major_nm, a.minor_cd, a.created_at, a.created_by, a.updated_at, a.updated_by, a.minor_nm, a.minor_desc, a.ord_seq, a.extra_1, a.extra_2, a.extra_3, a.extra_4, a.extra_5, a.remark, a.use_yn, b.file_id FROM esg.tb_common_d a left join esg.tb_common_m m on a.major_cd = m.major_cd left join esg.tb_sys_file b on b.target_type = a.major_cd and b.target_id = a.minor_cd WHERE a.major_cd = #{majorCd} AND a.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(minor_cd, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS minorCd FROM esg.tb_common_d WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND major_cd = #{majorCd}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_common_d ( comp_id, major_cd, minor_cd, minor_nm, remark, use_yn, ord_seq, extra_1, extra_2, extra_3, extra_4, extra_5, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{majorCd}, #{minorCd}, #{name}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, #{extra1}, #{extra2}, #{extra3}, #{extra4}, #{extra5}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_common_d SET minor_nm = #{name}, use_yn = #{useYn}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, extra_1 = #{extra1}, extra_2 = #{extra2}, extra_3 = #{extra3}, extra_4 = #{extra4}, extra_5 = #{extra5}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE 1 = 1 AND major_cd = #{majorCd} AND minor_cd = #{minorCd} AND comp_id = #{compId}
